name: Cana
oracleText:
Cana enters the battlefield tapped.
{T}: Add {W} or {U}.
{2}, {T}: Create a Food token. If you gained life this turn, scry 1.
flavorText: "Whatsoever he saith unto you, do it." — John 2:5
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. title: Feast of First Signs
